changeSet.author: openelis-immunology
changeSet.comment: Create workflow_page_template table for predefined page templates

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology
changeSet.comment: Insert predefined immunology workflow page templates

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Reception

column.name: description
column.value: Verify sample receipt and condition

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Verify sample receipt and condition. Check that all samples match the manifest. Inspect for damage, proper labeling, and temperature compliance.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Reception - Batch verification of incoming samples

column.name: name
column.value: Initial Processing

column.name: description
column.value: Centrifugation and visual inspection

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Perform initial processing steps including centrifugation and visual inspection. Record any quality issues.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Initial Processing - Centrifugation and sample preparation

column.name: description
column.value: Create aliquots from primary samples

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Create aliquots from primary samples as needed for testing. Label each aliquot with unique identifier.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Aliquoting - Bulk data entry for aliquot creation

column.name: name
column.value: Child Sample Creation

column.name: description
column.value: Create child samples for specific tests

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Create child samples for specific test requirements. Route samples to appropriate destinations (internal analysis, external lab, or storage).

column.name: default_content
column.value: Child Sample Creation - Branching workflow for sample routing

column.name: name
column.value: Plate Setup

column.name: description
column.value: Assign samples to analyzer plates

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign samples to analyzer plates with well coordinates. Use row-major ordering (A1, A2...B1, B2...).

column.name: default_content
column.value: Plate Setup - Well coordinate assignment for analyzer

column.name: name
column.value: Analyzer Results

column.name: description
column.value: Import and review analyzer results

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Import analyzer results from CSV/Excel. Match results to samples by well coordinate or sample ID. Review and validate results.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Analyzer Results - Import and match analyzer output

column.name: description
column.value: Post-analysis review and QC

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Perform post-analysis review and quality checks. Flag any outliers or failed QC samples for repeat testing.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Post-Analysis - Individual sample review and QC

column.name: description
column.value: Compile final results

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Compile final results and prepare for reporting. Aggregate data from all test runs.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Compilation - Aggregate results for reporting

column.name: description
column.value: Archive samples and finalize

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Archive samples and finalize documentation. Assign storage locations and complete audit trail.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Archiving - Final storage assignment and documentation
